subcodes.first_line: Verily, Bahá speaketh in this hour wherein the Concourse on High and the dwellers of the Cities of Names lament in their grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البهاء ینطق فیهذا الحین الذی ینوح لحزنه الملا الاعلی و سکان مدائن الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
